pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 10+ consecutive quiet polls. No changes to dome site.
pipeline_status.analyst: Complete (last run 2026-04-07T21:45:00Z). EXP-017/018 resolved as duplicates of EXP-015/014. Fingerprint hunt: WIN-025 eclipse coverage fractions use globe-derived Besselian elements (confidence 0.85).
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Cycle 2, Phase 1: 30/67 WINs reviewed. Last review WIN-030 (2026-04-07T20:15Z). WIN-031 through WIN-067 pending.

integrity_status: WARN — 1 broken external link (INTERMAGNET download page, 404 after site redesign). All other checks PASS. 2028 tests passing.

internal_issues.description: WIN-015 needed full expansion: near-field apparatus (MHz frequencies, lambda/2pi context), Bruhn/Kuhlke critiques, theory-vs-experiment distinction, CUORE/LIGO/ADMX indirect evidence. EXP-017 tracked (duplicate of EXP-015).
WIN-012 spatial heterogeneity loophole. EXP-018 duplicate of EXP-014 (already applied in prior run). Expansion tracker and issue closed.
Chapman (1933) attribution imprecise. Updated to distinguish qualitative mechanism (Chapman) from quantitative predictions (Meza et al. 2021 Ashour-Chapman models).
WIN-030 finding field had duplicated clause: '48.6% RMS figure unverifiable (no computation in repo)' appeared twice. Merge artifact.
WIN-030 detail_evidence paragraph 2 repeated WGS84 projection argument from paragraph 1. Replaced with b/a axis ratio instability argument (0.70-0.90 across V5-V9 vs WGS84's 0.99664).
WIN-029 detail_verdict_text was terse and imprecise. Updated to name dome formula error (linear waveguide vs spherical eigenmode).
WIN-029 finding field didn't capture the formula error. Updated to include all three argument legs.

self_apply_summary.push_to_github: BLOCKED — push to local workspace origin rejected (checked-out branch). 2 commits locally committed in clean clone (/sessions/clever-ecstatic-bell/dome-review-clean). Files synced to workspace via cp. GitHub push requires credentials.

recommended_actions.action: Push to GitHub: cd /path/to/clean-clone && git remote set-url origin https://github.com/funwithscience-org/dome-model-review && git push origin main. 2 commits ready with 7 patches applied.
Fix broken INTERMAGNET link (404) in WIN-010 detail_evidence (the <a href='https://www.intermagnet.org/'> still resolves but the download-specific URL does not). Low severity — monitoring.
Curmudgeon Cycle 2 continues at WIN-031 (37 WINs pending). No user action needed.

notes: 0 open issues at end of run (all resolved or assigned-analyst). Clean slate.
All 18 EXP items complete and integrated.
GitHub push pending — credential issue only, not a code or data problem.
